raw.subject: Your Mobile page caught my eye
raw.body:
Hi,

I noticed you're always promoting your 24/7 self-service car wash, which is great for truckers and boat owners. It's impressive to see you're open all hours, catering to a wide range of customers.

But I noticed you don't have your own website yet, which might be leaving some potential clients unsure about how to reach you or learn more about your services. A clear online presence can definitely help attract more customers and bookings.

I took a look at your Facebook page and came up with a simple homepage idea that matches your business. It features a services overview section, a photo gallery to showcase your clean cars, a contact section for easy inquiries, and a map to help customers find you.

https://sites.damianbasilio.dev/preview/parkway-carwash-mobile

If you're interested in learning more about how to build out a professional website like this, I'd be happy to discuss a flat fee for local businesses and answer any questions you may have. Please reply or give me a quick call to explore the possibilities.
